action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed again on deprecated 'verbose' arg in ReduceLROnPlateau (same error as iters 4/7/9); current train.py is truncated in checkpoint save dict (missing 'dropout' etc.); best test AUC remains 0.7553 (val peak ~0.7566). Curves show good loss drop to ~0.49 with overfitting post-peak. Analysis: Persistent code bugs wasting iters; embedded DKT (LSTM on skill-correct embeddings) is solid but needs stable training loop with full hparam persistence for predict.py, proper ES/scheduler without deprecated args. Time per successful iter ~50-80s leaves room for 3-4 more runs. Decision: Fully rewrite clean complete train.py (remove verbose, fix save dict with all params, robust ES on val_auc, per-epoch jsonl logging only, minimal stdout); use tuned params h=896/l=2/e=128/d=0.4/lr=3e-4/wd=1e-5/epochs=50/sch-pat=4/es-pat=10 for better capacity-reg balance to push val peak higher and improve test AUC. Keep model.py/predict.py unchanged. Execute training then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
